name: Five fold tower
developer: 亿面怪杰, 捶捶背背券
publisher: 亿面怪杰, 捶捶背背券
short_description: "Five Towers" is a Roguelike game, where the main gameplay is to fight monsters in the overhead corner. There are over 100 types of magic weapons and talents in the game, and there are various types of monsters in the tower, as well as multiple bosses for players to challenge.
detailed_description:
"Five Towers" is a role-playing Roguelike game with a cultivation theme. The main gameplay of the game is to fight monsters and climb tower levels from a top-down perspective. There are more than 100 types of magic weapons and talents in the game, and thousands of BD can be combined for players to freely match. There are also various types of monsters in the tower and distinctive bosses for players to challenge.

Main gameplay:

  • All magic treasures strengthen inheritance

  • Magic weapon monster fighting upgrade

  • Interactive triggering of main and auxiliary magic weapons

  • Talent unlocking inheritance

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Indonesian, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean, Khmer
